name: Sagrada
description: A dice-drafting game where players build a stained-glass window by placing coloured dice under placement restrictions.

name: The Lost Expedition
description: A card-driven survival adventure in the Amazon where players manage food, ammo and health while traversing the jungle.

name: The King Is Dead
description: Players influence the new king’s reign in medieval Britain by taking actions in various provinces — balancing loyalty, taxes and revolts.

name: Quoridor
description: An abstract strategy game where the goal is to move your pawn to the opposite edge of the board while placing walls to block your opponent.

name: Ticket to Ride
description: Collect train cards and claim routes across a map to fulfill tickets and earn points.

name: Love Letter
description: A quick deduction and bluffing card game where players aim to deliver a love letter to the princess while avoiding elimination.

name: Munchkin
description: A tongue-in-cheek adventure card game where players backstab each other, grab loot and try to reach level 10 first.

name: Super Munchkin
description: An expanded version of Munchkin with bigger cards, more levels and extra loot – same wild back-stabbing fun.

name: Bang!
description: A hidden-role card game set in a Wild West town where deputies, outlaws and renegades duel until only one role remains victorious.

name: 6 nimmt!
description: A fast card-placement game where players try to avoid being stuck with penalty cards while playing numbered cards in ascending order.

name: Exploding Kittens
description: A light and silly elimination card game where drawing an exploding kitten means you’re out unless you defuse or redirect it.

name: Onitama
description: A quick two-player abstract strategy game reminiscent of chess, where players use a shared set of movement cards to capture the opponent's master pawn.

name: Nobi Nobi GDR Spada
description: A kids’ role-play/adventure game centered around swords – simple rules and fun scenes for young players.

name: Nobi Nobi GDR Magia
description: A kids’ role-play/adventure game centered around magic – simple rules and fun scenes for young players.

name: Deckscape - Il destino di Londra
description: An escape-room style card game where players solve mysteries in London using interactive decks of cards.

name: Dixit
description: A beautifully illustrated party game where players use imagery to convey clues and guess each other's cards.

name: Risk!
description: The classic global domination board game where players arm their armies, attack territories and strive to conquer the world.

name: Carcassonne Big Box
description: The Big Box edition of Carcassonne includes the base game plus many expansions. Players build a medieval landscape by placing tiles and deploying followers.

name: Don’t Drink & Draw
description: A fast-paced party drawing game often played with drinks, where players attempt to draw and guess under time pressure.

name: What Do You Meme?
description: A meme-caption card game where players compete to create the funniest pairing of image and caption cards.

name: Uno
description: A classic turn-based card game where players aim to be the first to get rid of all their cards by matching colours or numbers and using action cards.
